---
ID: US-SLD-064
Title: Expand Advanced HTML Import Resilience
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want import to handle broader static design constructs
So fewer production slides require manual reconstruction

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Pseudo-element extraction support is improved beyond baseline bars/highlights.
- [ ] SVG import is supported as image fallback and/or vector-native layer where feasible.
- [ ] External stylesheet resolution is improved with explicit warning/report behavior.
- [ ] Font embedding and fallback mapping rules are documented and enforced.
- [ ] Unsupported constructs fail gracefully with actionable warnings.
